name: Americans with Disabilities Act and Section 504
description: Prohibits discrimination against individuals with disabilities
enforcement_agency: U.S. Department of Education, Office for Civil Rights; Department of Justice
penalty_authority: Loss of federal funding, civil penalties, injunctive relief

requirements.title: Section 504 Coordinator
requirements.description: Institution with 15+ employees must designate a coordinator for Section 504 compliance

requirements.title: Academic Adjustments
requirements.description: Institution must make reasonable modifications to academic requirements for students with disabilities

requirements.title: Program Accessibility
requirements.description: Programs and activities must be accessible to individuals with disabilities

requirements.title: Effective Communication
requirements.description: Institution must ensure effective communication with individuals with disabilities

requirements.title: Grievance Procedures
requirements.description: Institution must adopt grievance procedures for disability discrimination complaints
